function.name: report_wrong_number
function.description: Use ONLY when the call has reached a person who is NOT the intended participant AND the number is NOT the right number for the intended participant (i.e., this is a wrong number). The tool will speak a brief apology and end the call, and the call will be marked as a wrong number for the operator. Do NOT use this tool if the person who answered confirms the number is correct (use schedule_first_attempt instead in that case). Do NOT use this tool when the intended participant themselves answers.

messages.content: Sorry to have bothered you. Goodbye.
